# terrible_community_general_vertica_role (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `role` (String) Name of the role to add or remove.

### Optional

- `assigned_roles` (String) Comma separated list of roles to assign to the role.
- `cluster` (String) Name of the Vertica cluster.
- `db` (String) Name of the Vertica database.
- `login_password` (String) The password used to authenticate with.
- `login_user` (String) The username used to authenticate with.
- `port` (String) Vertica cluster port to connect to.
- `state` (String) Whether to create `present`, drop `absent` or lock `locked` a role.
